title: Create: Renewable Natural Blocks
description: Create Mod Addon adding recipes to renewably craft Minecraft's Natural Blocks!
body:
This Create Mod Addon aims to add renewable crafting recipes for Minecrafts most used Natural Building Blocks, via recipes such as compacting, smoking, mixing, crushing etc. The Mod adds recipes for the following blocks: Endstone, Stone, Cobblestone, Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate, Calcite, Tuff, Netherrack, Magma Block, Rooted Dirt, Dirt, Soul Sand, Pointed Dripstone and Soul Soil. To view all the recipes for these blocks, see the Gallery tab. 





**Recommending mods such as REI, JEI or Similar mods to view all recipes within your game**





If you wish more recipes to be added to the pack, please feel free to ask in the comments with your suggested recipe!
